# Label Policy

Use the following labels as the minimum shared vocabulary for internal development.

| Label | Use |
|---|---|
| `bug` | Confirmed defects, regressions, or broken expected behavior. |
| `feature` | New functionality, enhancements, or planned implementation work. |
| `docs` | Documentation-only work, including process and repository guidance. |
| `blocked` | Work that cannot proceed until an external dependency or decision is resolved. |
| `needs-review` | Work is ready for reviewer attention or re-review after updates. |
| `priority:high` | Time-sensitive or merge-blocking work that should be handled first. |
| `priority:medium` | Important work that should be scheduled soon but is not urgent. |
| `priority:low` | Useful follow-up work that can wait without immediate impact. |

Apply at least one work-type label (`bug`, `feature`, or `docs`) and one priority label when creating or triaging issues.
